emails.subject: FW: TW Presentation.
emails.body: Michael, I prepared the TW Marketing slides. I have been incorporating Kim and Steve's comments. You can work with me on any questions you have or any additional information you may need from Marketing. I follow-up on your notes in red. Thx, Lindy

emails.subject: RE: TW Presentation.
emails.body: RE: TW Presentation. The "Total 2001 Revenue" number for slide 26 is $179,447,244. The percentages are: SoCal 30% Texaco 9% PG&E 9% Sempra 8% BP Energy 6% Duke 4% El Paso 4% Burlington 3% Agave 3% USGT 3% Other Shippers 22% ($38,875,051)
